## Summary

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Other:

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run validate`
- [ ] Focused tests/checks:
- [ ] Not run; reason:

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated or not needed
- [ ] README/install/security/plugin docs checked when relevant
- [ ] Public terminology matches `UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md`

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private URLs, local database files, plugin runtime data, or unsafe demo data added
- [ ] Security impact considered for Local Auth, Sessions, Provider Auth, plugins, filesystem/network access, Unsafe Mode, diagnostics, telemetry, and logs
- [ ] New logs/errors avoid leaking secrets or sensitive local paths

## UI changes

- [ ] Screenshots or screen recordings included when useful
- [ ] Screenshots use fake/demo data only
- [ ] `STYLE.md` followed for Mainview changes

## Notes for reviewers

-
